creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Created attachment 188458
PowerDNS Authoritative Server: Update to 4.1.0

IMPORTANT: This release removes support for recursor pass-through. This might impact a lot of people!

More information can be found here (including other improvements/fixes/changes): https://blog.powerdns.com/2017/11/30/powerdns-authoritative-server-4-1/

Changelog: https://doc.powerdns.com/authoritative/changelog/4.1.html

The poudriere buildlog can be found here: https://pkg.cainites.net/data/latest-per-pkg/powerdns/4.1.0/freebsd_11-1x64-system.log
